items.reason: The PR adds a command reference and example, but it does not explain how the generated metastore_head_nodes config is deployed while existing dscli up still documents and consumes only metastore_head_node.
The Metastore deployment design still describes a single metastore_head_node and was not updated for the new multi-head metastore_head_nodes configuration.
The runtime/CLI context still maps Metastore deployment to a single metastore_head_node and omits the new dscli metastore_ha flow.
